episodes.title: Psychotherapist Reveals: I Survived My Mother's Religious Cult | True Story
episodes.description:
Welcome to Beauty of Colors Podcast — a motivational and personal growth podcast designed to help you heal from your past, build confidence, and transform your life from the inside out.

This channel is dedicated to empowering your mindset, strengthening your self-worth, and guiding you toward emotional freedom and authentic living. Through inspiring conversations, breakthrough strategies, and deep self-discovery insights, you’ll learn how to release what holds you back and step into your true power.

If you’re ready for growth, healing, and a mindset shift that changes everything, you’re in the right place.

episodes.title: How to Break Free from a Cult
episodes.description:
BIO

Isabella Young (B.Ed., M.Ed. pre.) felt most at home in Nature from childhood. Fueled by her experiences of the healing properties of the natural world, she became a pioneer in development of therapeutic Outdoor Adventure programs in Victoria, Australia until personal tragedy struck. Widowed, pregnant, and with her young son, Isabella began a healing journey that spans three decades. She has crisscrossed three continents under three different names, undertaking pilgrimages, retreats, shamanic journeys, and vision quests. She lived in tents, tipis, and ashrams, including eight years in a messianic cult as the wife of the ‘guru,’ who groomed then murdered her son. His murder broke her free from cult programming, and she escaped to Hawaii. Through her relentless devotion to healing and seeking truth and freedom, Isabella is now thriving and writing books to share wisdom from her experiences, the Aina, and other teachers that supports optimal health, sovereignty, anarchy, and the freedom and future of Humanity.
